description:
Parent epic: V3 E3: Context and typed results

Source task 2/8 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Verify context schemas validate and normalize caller-provided context.

Epic closure criteria:
- new users can pass a naked map first and add schema later
- typed results are stable enough for app code
- context/result docs avoid conflating state, memory, and output

comments.text: Added end-to-end schema normalization coverage. The test verifies a running schema-backed agent applies defaults and caller overrides before controls receive runtime context.

title: E3: Verify context schemas validate and normalize caller-provided context
